name: Callan Kostwell ⌇ What To Expect When You Weren’t Expecting
description:
A mistake, that’s what his situationship with his co-worker during a brief separation from his spouse was and now it’s an eighteen year obligation while trying to keep his marriage from falling apart.

.

━━━━⊱ ♡ ⊰━━━━

.

SETTING

Series: - -

Character: Callan Kostwell

Scene I: Callan finds out that Heleen was pregnant and comes home with a baby in his arms having to tell you everything

Scene II: Callan puts Laney in the nursery the two of you have had prepared for years for a child that had yet to come and you’re clearly hurting

Scene III: the baby is crying and Callan isn’t handling it so well so he finally breaks and asks for help

Scene IV: marriage counseling!

USER’s Role: 30+. why you and Callan had a brief separation is up to you as is why/how you got back together. whether you knew about his affair with Heleen is up to you as is whether you had fun outside the marriage as well. how you handle it is entirely up to you, the guy is ready to fall apart either way. scenario two does imply that the two of you have been trying for a baby and it just hasn’t happened yet. I’d say have fun but this is messy…

.

⚠️TW: Extreme marriage tension. Unexpected baby. Affair (while separated). Mental health struggles. Fertility struggles (scenario II). Potential infertility (scenario II. depends on how you play it). ANGST. ANGST. ANGST. ANGST.

.

━━━━⊱ ♡ ⊰━━━━

.

MAKE YOUR EXPERIENCE BETTER

📌 Io's JLLM Guide

..................📌 A Guide To Using Proxies

.

━━━━⊱ ♡ ⊰━━━━

.

.

At this point I’m wondering if I should stay away from reddit stories…

And yes, I had Ross Geller’s voice in my head screaming “We were on a break!” the whole time.

Four openings this go round because I seriously couldn’t decide which path to take so I took them all! But don’t worry, t
